creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: pi
Date: Fri May  2 20:17:55 2014
New Revision: 352845
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352845
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352845/

Log:
  mail/imapsync: update 1.580 -> 1.584
  
  PR:             ports/186775
  Submitted by:   pi
  Approved by:    jadawin (mentor)

Modified:
  head/mail/imapsync/Makefile
  head/mail/imapsync/distinfo

Modified: head/mail/imapsync/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/imapsync/Makefile	Fri May  2 19:57:37 2014	(r352844)
+++ head/mail/imapsync/Makefile	Fri May  2 20:17:55 2014	(r352845)
@@ -2,13 +2,12 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	imapsync
-PORTVERSION=	1.580
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.584
 CATEGORIES=	mail perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	https://fedorahosted.org/released/${PORTNAME}/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 
-MAINTAINER=	fbsd-ports@opsec.eu
+MAINTAINER=	pi@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	IMAP synchronization, copy or migration tool
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Mail-IMAPClient>0:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-Mail-IMAPClient \
@@ -19,6 +18,8 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Mail-IMAPClient>0:${PORT
 USES=		perl5
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 
+PORTSCOUT=	limit:^1\.(\d\.){3}
+
 PLIST_FILES=	bin/${PORTNAME} man/man1/${PORTNAME}.1.gz
 
 POD2MAN?=	pod2man

Modified: head/mail/imapsync/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/imapsync/distinfo	Fri May  2 19:57:37 2014	(r352844)
+++ head/mail/imapsync/distinfo	Fri May  2 20:17:55 2014	(r352845)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (imapsync-1.580.tgz) = 053992837b652406d646eb3d83f1128799ea17116df544cd4f9364f3762b0bec
-SIZE (imapsync-1.580.tgz) = 1029856
+SHA256 (imapsync-1.584.tgz) = 6f5eefe7646b9d2c41f94d100ee60d390a090c45e41c244de45ac7c31efc25ae
+SIZE (imapsync-1.584.tgz) = 844115
